allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 11616 -Force -Confirm:$false; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "npm.cmd" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\) -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5173/src/index.css" -UseBasicParsing; $ok = $r.Content -match 'tailwindcss v4'; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\); Tailwind v4 CSS served: $ok; length $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "Request failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -Confirm:$false)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "node.exe" -ArgumentList "server/index.js" -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\) -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Method Post http://localhost:3001/api/collect -UseBasicParsing } catch { $r = $_.Exception.Response; $sr = New-Object IO.StreamReader\($r.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "409 body: $\($sr.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -Confirm:$false)

PowerShell($p = Start-Process -FilePath "node.exe" -ArgumentList "server/index.js" -WorkingDirectory \(Get-Location\) -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; curl.exe -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/collect; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -Confirm:$false)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path .env\) { $k = \(Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -match '^YOUTUBE_API_KEY=\(.+\)$' }\); if \($k\) { "키 설정됨 \(길이: $\(\($k -replace '^YOUTUBE_API_KEY=',''\).Length\)자\)" } else { "'.env'는 있지만 YOUTUBE_API_KEY 줄이 없거나 비어 있음" } } else { "'.env' 파일 없음" })

PowerShell(node --check server/collector.js; node --check server/youtube.js; node --check server/config.js; if \(Test-Path .env\) { $k = \(Get-Content .env | Where-Object { $_ -match '^YOUTUBE_API_KEY=.+' }\); if \($k\) { "구문 OK + 키 설정 확인" } else { "구문 OK, 하지만 .env에 YOUTUBE_API_KEY 값이 없음" } } else { "구문 OK, .env 없음" })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(90\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $s = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:3001/api/status -TimeoutSec 5 } catch { continue }; if \($s.lastCollectedAt\) { break } } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); $s | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)
